name: kanji-roman-tools
description: Project-local MCP tool catalog for Kanji-Roman development.

tools.name: validate_project
tools.description: Run local JSON, static path, and placeholder validation.

tools.name: preflight
tools.description: Run validation and print the manual HTTP browser check.

tools.name: serve_static_site
tools.description: Serve the current directory for manual UI verification.

notes: This catalog is intentionally local and does not start network services by itself.
Use data/... relative paths for public JSON compatibility.
Do not wire external datasets into an MCP server until source licenses are reviewed.
